name: Design documentation, expertise & construction permit
description: Design documentation (stage P), positive expert review conclusion and construction permit (Art.51 of the Town Planning Code of the Russian Federation). The technical customer accepts the design-and-permit milestone; the fixed design fee is certified and the excavation phase is unlocked. Building-level scope (zone=BLDG).

evidence.description: Design documentation (stage P, sections POS/KR/AR) — stage-P design set lodged for expert review.
Positive expert review conclusion (Main State Expertise / non-state expert review) — the legal precondition for the permit.
Construction permit (Art.51 of the Town Planning Code of the Russian Federation) — issued by the building authority; carries permit_no and validity.
GPZU (land-use plan) of the land plot — fixes the build envelope.

checks.description: The permit is not valid without the design set and a positive expertise conclusion.
The construction-permit number must be recorded.
Permit validity start is on/after the project baseline.

consequences.contractRef: BOQ 1.1 'Design documentation + working documentation + state expert review'
consequences.description: Design milestone paid in full (lump), no retention.
The technical customer owns permit validity.
